---
title: "DWI Interactive Dashboard"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
server: shiny
---

```{ r }

library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
library(leaflet)
library(bslib)

# ---- Simulated Data ----
set.seed(123)
n <- 1500

data <- tibble(
  date = sample(seq.Date(as.Date("2023-01-01"), as.Date("2024-12-31"), by="day"), n, replace = TRUE),
  hour = sample(0:23, n, replace = TRUE),
  lat = runif(n, 31.70, 31.85),
  lon = runif(n, -106.55, -106.35),
  crash = rbinom(n,1,0.6),
  arrest = rbinom(n,1,0.35),
  alcohol_sales = round(runif(n,1200,7000))
)

data$weekday <- wday(data$date,label=TRUE)

monthly <- data %>%
  mutate(month=floor_date(date,"month")) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    crashes=sum(crash),
    arrests=sum(arrest),
    sales=mean(alcohol_sales),
    .groups="drop"
  )

heat_data <- data %>%
  group_by(hour,weekday) %>%
  summarise(crashes=sum(crash),.groups="drop")

total_crashes <- sum(data$crash)
total_arrests <- sum(data$arrest)
peak_hour <- data %>% count(hour) %>% arrange(desc(n)) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(hour)

# ---- Risk Clock Data ----
# 24-hour risk levels
risk_hour <- tibble(
  hour = 0:23,
  risk = case_when(
    hour >= 23 | hour <= 2 ~ 3, # HIGH
    hour >= 18 ~ 2,             # MEDIUM
    TRUE ~ 1                    # LOW
  ),
  label = case_when(
    hour >= 23 | hour <= 2 ~ "High",
    hour >= 18 ~ "Medium",
    TRUE ~ "Low"
  )
)

# ---- UI ----
ui <- fluidPage(
  
  theme = bs_theme(
    version = 5,
    bootswatch = "flatly",
    base_font = font_google("Merriweather"),
    heading_font = font_google("Merriweather"),
    primary = "#e63946",
    secondary = "#457b9d"
  ),
  
  # ---- Hero Section ----
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML("
    h1 {font-weight: 700; font-size: 3em; margin-bottom: 0.2em;}
    h2 {font-weight: 600; color:#e63946;}
    p {font-size: 1.1em; line-height:1.5;}
    .section {padding: 60px 40px;}
    .value-box {text-align:center; padding:20px; border-radius:5px; background-color:#f1f1f1; margin-bottom:20px;}
  "))
  ),
  
  div(class="section", style="background-color:#f8f9fa;",
      h1("Alcohol and Driving in El Paso"),
      p("Explore when, where, and why alcohol-related crashes occur across the city. Scroll down to uncover patterns and learn about safe driving."),
      fluidRow(
        column(4, div(class="value-box", h2(total_crashes), "Alcohol-Related Crashes")),
        column(4, div(class="value-box", h2(total_arrests), "DWI Arrests")),
        column(4, div(class="value-box", h2(paste0(peak_hour,":00")), "Peak Crash Hour"))
      )
  ),
  
  # ---- Crash Map Section ----
  div(class="section",
      h2("Where Do Crashes Happen?"),
      p("Click points on the map to see crash locations. Red markers indicate alcohol-related crashes."),
      leafletOutput("map", height=500)
  ),
  
  # ---- Crash Trends Section ----
  div(class="section", style="background-color:#f8f9fa;",
      h2("Crash Trends Over Time"),
      p("Monthly crash trends show when alcohol-related incidents peak."),
      plotlyOutput("trend")
  ),
  
  # ---- Hourly Heatmap Section ----
  div(class="section",
      h2("When Are Crashes Most Likely?"),
      p("View crash frequency by hour of day and day of the week."),
      plotlyOutput("heatmap", height=500)
  ),
  
  # ---- Alcohol Sales Section ----
  div(class="section", style="background-color:#f8f9fa;",
      h2("Alcohol Sales vs Crashes"),
      p("Compare monthly alcohol sales to crash trends."),
      plotlyOutput("sales")
  ),
  
  # ---- Risk Clock Section ----
  div(class="section",
      h2("🚦 DWI Risk Clock"),
      p("This clock shows typical crash risk in El Paso by hour of the day. Red = high, orange = medium, green = low."),
      plotlyOutput("riskclock", height=600)
  )
  
)

# ---- SERVER ----
server <- function(input, output, session){
  
  # Map
  output$map <- renderLeaflet({
    leaflet(data) %>%
      addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
      addCircleMarkers(lng=~lon, lat=~lat, radius=5, color="#e63946", stroke=FALSE, fillOpacity=0.7)
  })
  
  # Trend Chart
  output$trend <- renderPlotly({
    p <- ggplot(monthly,aes(month,crashes)) +
      geom_line(color="#e63946",linewidth=1.5) +
      geom_point(color="#e63946",size=2) +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(x="Month",y="Crashes")
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  # Hourly Heatmap
  output$heatmap <- renderPlotly({
    p <- ggplot(heat_data,aes(hour,weekday,fill=crashes)) +
      geom_tile() +
      scale_fill_viridis_c(option="plasma") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(x="Hour",y="Day of Week",fill="Crashes")
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  # Alcohol Sales vs Crashes
  output$sales <- renderPlotly({
    p <- ggplot(monthly,aes(month)) +
      geom_line(aes(y=crashes,color="Crashes"),linewidth=1.5) +
      geom_line(aes(y=sales/50,color="Alcohol Sales (scaled)"),linewidth=1.5) +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(y="Value", color="")
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  # Risk Clock (circular clock)
  output$riskclock <- renderPlotly({
    
    # Convert hours to 12-hour positions for clock (theta in degrees)
    theta <- seq(0, 360 - 15, length.out=24) # 24 hours
    
    plot_ly(
      type = 'barpolar',
      r = risk_hour$risk,
      theta = theta,
      width = 600,
      height = 600,
      color = risk_hour$label,
      colors = c("Low"="#2a9d8f","Medium"="#f4a261","High"="#e63946"),
      marker = list(line = list(color='black', width=1))
    ) %>%
      layout(
        polar = list(
          radialaxis = list(showticklabels=FALSE, ticks=""),
          angularaxis = list(
            rotation=90,
            direction="clockwise",
            tickmode="array",
            tickvals=seq(0, 345, by=30),
            ticktext=c("12AM","1AM","2AM","3AM","4AM","5AM","6AM","7AM","8AM","9AM","10AM","11AM")
          )
        ),
        showlegend = TRUE
      )
  })
  
}

# ---- Run App ----
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
